about.title: About ClueGrid
about.subtitle: A real-time, distributed word-deduction grid system. Explore the technical specifications and structural architecture of the ClueGrid application.
about.missionText: ClueGrid is engineered to deliver high-fidelity, real-time tabletop board simulations in a distributed web environment. Utilizing a synchronized state engine, the platform enables multi-user collaboration and competitive execution across varied grid configurations and localized game variants.
about.techDesc: Engineered with modern full-stack web technologies to ensure zero-lag gameplay, complete state safety, and a highly responsive design:
about.footerText: ClueGrid is maintained as a modular repository, integrating real-time action logging, custom timers, and audio synthesis. Please refer to the Changelog section for release logs, visual overhaul details, and performance optimizations.
